steps.title: Understand the meaning of h in the circle equation
steps.content: In the standard form of a circle equation, the value $h$ is the $x$-coordinate of the circle's center, and $k$ is the $y$-coordinate.

steps.title: Identify h from the given center
steps.content: Since the center is at $(7, 2)$, we have center = $(h, k) = (7, 2)$. Therefore, $h = 7$.
